state.next-action: `12-02` now uses `/portal/ops/*` as the canonical staff route family while legacy `/ops/*` paths remain compatibility redirects. `/portal/ops/users` covers role-template assignment, Clerk invite send or reissue, pending-invite revoke, provider resync, and app-owned suspend or restore actions while preserving first-party staff roles and non-active status during Clerk reconciliation. `/portal/ops/customers` now has its first app-owned mutation surface too: set primary customer, send portal access to a selected linked user, and repair Stripe customer linkage through `/api/internal/ops/customers/[id]`. Continue the phase by adding cleanup actions on that same surface: unlink or clear primary-customer state, clear or normalize stale portal access, and clear or resync Stripe linkage without making Clerk or Stripe the UI contract.
